"'''Impregnable'''" is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story from ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 7]]'' featuring [[Bultar Swan/Legends|Bultar Swan]].

==Plot summary==
After a massive [[Battle of Amaltanna/Legends|battle]] on [[Amaltanna/Legends|Amaltanna]], all of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Bultar Swan/Legends|Bultar Swan's]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] are defeated. The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Edi Wedd|leader]] remains snug in his fortress. Swan, determined not to fail, enters the heavily protected mansion. Ignoring the taunts of her foe, Swan slices through doors, fends off [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], leaps huge chasms, and traverses through mazes, finally to reach the impregnable door leading to the leader's chambers. Quick on her feet, she slices through the control panel with her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], locking herself out, but locking the Separatist leader in. Watching the Jedi exit the fortress, the leader sighs to himself, knowing that his saferoom will be his tomb.
